name: Suspicious Process Spawned by FTP
description: Detects suspicious activity involving ftp.exe, including script execution, renaming, and the spawning of child processes, which can indicate malicious activity.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed (e.g., 'ftp.exe' or the child process spawned by it).

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the process executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used for the process execution.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process (if applicable).

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process (if applicable).
